context: Tests whether swift-concurrency gates Swift 6.4 cleanup APIs correctly and handles the Xcode 26.5 nonisolated(nonsending) explicit-capture closure workaround.

checklist.name: Async Defer Availability
checklist.description: States that async defer is a Swift 6.4 / Xcode 27 beta-era feature and should not be presented as available to Swift 6.3 / Xcode 26.5 projects.

checklist.name: Cancellation Shield Availability
checklist.description: States that withTaskCancellationShield is a Swift 6.4 / iOS 27+ beta-era API and should be used only for short cleanup or rollback, not ordinary cancelable work.

checklist.name: Async Defer Cancellation Semantics
checklist.description: Explains that async defer cleanup still observes task cancellation unless a cancellation shield is deliberately used.

checklist.name: Explicit Capture Workarounds
checklist.description: For the Xcode 26.5 explicit-capture closure issue, recommends only the documented workarounds: remove explicit captures when safe, or use a local @Sendable nonisolated(nonsending) async function.

checklist.name: Scope Control
checklist.description: Avoids retargeting the whole project or broad skill guidance to Swift 6.4 / Xcode 27.
